title: Test split part 1: lib-module blocks out of the monolith
action: Move contiguous section blocks from skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs into new per-module files under skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/: test_cells.mjs (cells add/update/claim/cap/budgets/judge/claim-next blocks ~463-2076 plus later cells-only satellites), test_claims.mjs (~2162-2400 + resolveSessionId/sessionless/concurrent-Worker blocks), test_reservations.mjs (~2077-2160 + fsh-7 session holds), test_feedback.mjs (~4186-5287 incl mergeDigests/ENTRY_FIELD_SPEC/ranking), test_reviews.mjs (~8098-8842). Method per file: cut the EXACT contiguous range preserving internal order; prepend fixture-helper import + only the lib imports that range uses; each file gets its own makeTempRepo() root. A section inside a moved range that referenced the ORIGINAL shared accumulated root must be audited: if it depended on state built by sections remaining in test_lib.mjs, make it self-contained (own temp root) and note it in the trace deviations. Register each new file in scripts/run_verify.mjs SUITES; extend scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs MANDATORY_SUITES to name each new file. Conservation census: sum of check() across test_lib.mjs + new files == pre-move count (record numbers in trace). Self-onboard + render trees; full verify green.

truths: The five module test files exist, run standalone green, and are registered in SUITES + MANDATORY_SUITES.
check() conservation census recorded and equal; no test logic changed beyond self-containment fixes noted in deviations.
prohibitions: Do NOT reorder sections within a moved range.
Do NOT delete test_lib.mjs in this cell.
Do NOT weaken any assertion to make a moved section pass — self-containment fixes add setup, never remove checks.

trace.outcome: Split test_lib.mjs into five per-module suites (cells/reservations/claims/feedback/reviews); check() conservation census balances 430=430; full verify green
deviations: Self-containment fixes (all additive, zero checks weakened): copied makeStateRepo() into test_cells.mjs and test_reviews.mjs (was only reachable via hoisting from a section left in test_lib.mjs); copied makeCellFile() into test_cells.mjs (same reason); seeded a dedicated 'refusal-fix-demo' cell in test_lib.mjs's remaining refusal-message-contract test instead of reusing 'demo-2' (which used to be seeded by the now-moved cells section); gave test_lib.mjs's remaining backlog-add-verb section its own local `const PIN` (was previously a shared const defined inside the moved feedback section).

Concurrent-session note: this checkout has a second, live, uncommitted session in flight (xwh-2 / worktree-holds hardening) touching skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs, lib/worktree-store.mjs, scripts/test_worktree_cli.mjs, and a new scripts/test_worktree_holds.mjs, none of which this cell reserved or touched. Running the required self-onboard + render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs + release_manifest.mjs --write picked up that session's files too (mirrors, .bee/bin/, .bee/onboarding.json, .bee-render.json caches) as an unavoidable side effect of those repo-wide tools, but this cell's commit stages only cs-2a's own files (the six test files, run_verify.mjs, test_verify_manifest.mjs, their four plugin/mirror copies, and the release-manifest.json hash-ledger refresh) and leaves every xwh-2 file unstaged/untouched for that session to commit on its own.
